sections.instruction: Questions 11-12: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 13-14: Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 15-18: Choose the correct letter A, B or C. Questions 19-20: Select TWO answers.

questions.content: What is one of the new advantages in the dining facilities?
What was one problem with the dining options last year?
options: A students did not have enough to eat
B students has to pay too much money
C students had to eat whatever was served

C they will make more kinds

questions.content: When will the dining facilities open and close?
What can students do if they are hungry in the afternoon?
options: A go out and buy food on the street
C go to the student store for snacks

questions.content: What must you do to eat in the dining facilities if you are not a student?
options: A purchase a dining facility card
B purchase meals at the door
C purchase meals from other students

questions.content: Which of the following are rules of the dining facilities? Select TWO answers.
options: B you may bring friends in to eat
C bring your own plates and trays
D clean your own plates and trays

sections.instruction: Questions 21-25: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 26-30: Write the appropriate letter A-C next to questions 26-30.
